'''tholajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nympholeptic|nympholeptic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-l-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nympholeptic|nympholeptic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| tholajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tholajithi|tholajithi]] || [[word:tholajiji|tholajiji]] || [[word:tholajishi|tholajishi]] || [[word:tholajiki|tholajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tholajuthuthu|tholajuthuthu]] || [[word:tholajujuju|tholajujuju]] || [[word:tholajushushu|tholajushushu]] || [[word:tholajukuku|tholajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholajuthu|tholajuthu]] || [[word:tholajuju|tholajuju]] || [[word:tholajushu|tholajushu]] || [[word:tholajuku|tholajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholajufthuf|tholajufthuf]] || [[word:tholajufjuf|tholajufjuf]] || [[word:tholajufshuf|tholajufshuf]] || [[word:tholajufkuf|tholajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tholajethe|tholajethe]] || [[word:tholajeje|tholajeje]] || [[word:tholajeshe|tholajeshe]] || [[word:tholajeke|tholajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tholajothotho|tholajothotho]] || [[word:tholajojojo|tholajojojo]] || [[word:tholajoshosho|tholajoshosho]] || [[word:tholajokoko|tholajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholajotho|tholajotho]] || [[word:tholajojo|tholajojo]] || [[word:tholajosho|tholajosho]] || [[word:tholajoko|tholajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholajofthof|tholajofthof]] || [[word:tholajofjof|tholajofjof]] || [[word:tholajofshof|tholajofshof]] || [[word:tholajofkof|tholajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:tholajïfthïf|tholajïfthïf]] || [[word:tholajïfjïf|tholajïfjïf]] || [[word:tholajïfshïf|tholajïfshïf]] || [[word:tholajïfkïf|tholajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:tholajïfthïfthïf|tholajïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:tholajïfjïfjïf|tholajïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:tholajïfshïfshïf|tholajïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:tholajïfkïfkïf|tholajïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholajïfthïf|tholajïfthïf]] || [[word:tholajïfjïf|tholajïfjïf]] || [[word:tholajïfshïf|tholajïfshïf]] || [[word:tholajïfkïf|tholajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholajïfthïf|tholajïfthïf]] || [[word:tholajïfjïf|tholajïfjïf]] || [[word:tholajïfshïf|tholajïfshïf]] || [[word:tholajïfkïf|tholajïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tholajæthæ|tholajæthæ]] || [[word:tholajæjæ|tholajæjæ]] || [[word:tholajæshæ|tholajæshæ]] || [[word:tholajækæ|tholajækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tholajathatha|tholajathatha]] || [[word:tholajajaja|tholajajaja]] || [[word:tholajashasha|tholajashasha]] || [[word:tholajakaka|tholajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholajatha|tholajatha]] || [[word:tholajaja|tholajaja]] || [[word:tholajasha|tholajasha]] || [[word:tholajaka|tholajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholajafthaf|tholajafthaf]] || [[word:tholajafjaf|tholajafjaf]] || [[word:tholajafshaf|tholajafshaf]] || [[word:tholajafkaf|tholajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:tholajasha|tholajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:tholajshësha|tholajshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tholajrosha|tholajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tholajmusha|tholajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:tholajyasha|tholajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotholajnkshësha|gotholajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotholajnkrosha|gotholajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotholajnkmusha|gotholajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotholajnkyasha|gotholajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:tholalajasha|tholalajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tholalajshësha|tholalajshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tholalajrosha|tholalajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tholalajmusha|tholalajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tholalajyasha|tholalajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotholalajnkshësha|gotholalajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotholalajnkrosha|gotholalajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotholalajnkmusha|gotholalajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotholalajnkyasha|gotholalajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thelæjasha|thelæjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thelæjshësha|thelæjshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thelæjrosha|thelæjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thelæjmusha|thelæjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thelæjyasha|thelæjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothelæjnkshësha|gothelæjnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothelæjnkrosha|gothelæjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothelæjnkmusha|gothelæjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothelæjnkyasha|gothelæjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:tholfajasha|tholfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tholfajshësha|tholfajshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tholfajrosha|tholfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tholfajmusha|tholfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tholfajyasha|tholfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotholfajnkshësha|gotholfajnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotholfajnkrosha|gotholfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotholfajnkmusha|gotholfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotholfajnkyasha|gotholfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
